# Punto Reforma Sevilla

> Architecture and total renovations in Sevilla — for homes, apartments and commercial spaces. Custom carpentry, prime kitchens and bathrooms, project management and permits, from first idea to handover. One responsible contact throughout.

> Arquitectura de interiores y reformas integrales en Sevilla — para viviendas, pisos y locales comerciales. Carpintería a medida, cocinas y baños prime, coordinación de obra y gestión de permisos, desde la primera idea hasta la entrega. Un solo interlocutor responsable durante todo el proceso.

## Contact

- Website: https://sevilla.puntoreforma.es/
- Email: info@puntoreforma.es
- Phone: +34 662 411 064
- Location: Seville, Spain

## Services

- Reforma integral & gestión de obra — complete renovations for homes, apartments and commercial spaces, from first concept to handover
- Arquitectura & diseño — architecture, layout, material direction and design decisions for renovation projects
- Cocinas & baños prime — kitchens and bathrooms designed as central parts of the renovation
- Carpintería a medida & metal — bespoke wardrobes, storage, built-ins, furniture and custom metal constructions
- Comprobaciones técnicas & permisos — technical checks, permit coordination and procedures

## Pages

- [Home](https://sevilla.puntoreforma.es/): Services, process, gallery and contact form
- [Blog](https://sevilla.puntoreforma.es/blog/): Renovation guides and articles for Seville

## Blog Articles

- [Cambiar bañera por ducha en Sevilla](https://sevilla.puntoreforma.es/blog/cambiar-banera-por-ducha-sevilla/): Converting a bath to shower in Seville: step-by-step process, real 2026 prices and minor works permits at the Gerencia de Urbanismo.
- [Carpintería a medida en Sevilla](https://sevilla.puntoreforma.es/blog/carpinteria-a-medida-sevilla/): Custom carpentry in Seville: when it's worth it, built-in wardrobes, under-stair storage and made-to-measure solutions for Seville flats.
- [Cocinas pequeñas en Sevilla](https://sevilla.puntoreforma.es/blog/cocina-pequena-sevilla/): Small kitchen renovation ideas for Seville flats: galley, L-shape and U-shape layouts, smart storage and finishes for the local climate.
- [Licencias de obra en Sevilla](https://sevilla.puntoreforma.es/blog/licencias-obras-sevilla/): What licences and permits you need to renovate in Seville: declaración responsable, comunicación previa and when a full licence is required.
- [Precio reforma de baño en Sevilla](https://sevilla.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-bano-sevilla-precio/): Bathroom renovation prices in Seville in 2026: real costs by scope, waterproofing, community rules and what drives the price up.
- [Precio reforma de cocina Sevilla](https://sevilla.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-cocina-sevilla-precio/): Kitchen renovation prices in Seville in 2026: costs, materials, appliances and managing trades through the Andalusian summer heat.
- [Precio reforma integral Sevilla 2026](https://sevilla.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-integral-sevilla-precio/): Full renovation costs in Seville in 2026: price per m² by quality level, phased works and what a full project management service includes.
- [Reformar un piso antiguo en Sevilla](https://sevilla.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-piso-antiguo-sevilla/): Renovating an old house or flat in Seville without surprises: structural warning signs, wiring, plumbing and community of owners management.
- [Reforma de piso en Sevilla](https://sevilla.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-piso-sevilla/): Renovating a flat in Seville: real sequence of works, timelines, community rules and budget planning for 2026.
